topic: Agent-Scoped Hooks: Pre/Post Processing for Your Custom VS Code Agents
hook: Your .agent.md file just learned new tricks — agent-scoped hooks are here
audience: Developers building custom agents who need to add validation and processing logic to agent workflows
keyTakeaway: Agent-scoped hooks let you attach pre/post processing logic to specific agents without affecting other chat interactions
talkingPoints: What are agent-scoped hooks and how they differ from global hooks
Walkthrough: Adding hooks in the YAML frontmatter of your .agent.md file
Use case 1: Pre-processing hook that validates context before agent runs
Use case 2: Post-processing hook that logs or transforms agent output
Enable the feature: chat.useCustomAgentHooks setting and how runSubagent triggers hooks
trendContext: Agent-scoped hooks shipped as Preview feature in VS Code 1.111 (March 9, 2026) - enables governance patterns for custom agents that nobody else is covering yet
